title: Delete button for items and the associated items for the boards connected to them
excerpt: Under the “pro” subscription the CRM boards are only pre created for the main workspace. If I want to have the same boards for a different workspace then I would have to start from scratch by customizing a CRM space. I c…

posts.author: MarielGm0412 (Mariel G)
posts.cookedHtml:
Under the “pro” subscription the CRM boards are only pre created for the main workspace. If I want to have the same boards for a different workspace then I would have to start from scratch by customizing a CRM space. I created an “Accounts” board and a “Contacts” board and I linked both to each other… Now, if I have to delete an account then I want the contacts to be erased simultaneously. Since the forum and live agent were not helpful as much, I decided to go with a roundabout option:

  1. Create a connection between both boards and treat the “Accounts” board as the master board.
  2. Create a status column in the master board that I could select “Delete” and have this status trigger a deletion of the item (“Account”).
  3. Have a mirror column in the child board “Contacts” of the status column.
  4. Create two automations for the “Contacts” board:
    • Inside the automation space, type “280” to find a premade automation recipe that will allow you to utilize the mirror column: "When “Status (Mirror Column)” changes to “Delete”, change “Delete trigger” to “Delete”. Note: “Delete trigger” is a new status column you have to create in the child board to use as a trigger.
    • Custom recipe: "When “Delete trigger” changes to “Delete” delete item.

It works for me. Both account and the contacts linked to it delete automatically… However, I would prefer to have a button that would do this in a more seamless way.

Also, the premade recipe 280 and other ones… should either be shown in the template center more explicitly or be allowed for custom made recipes.
